nasb.text: They rush on the city, They run on the wall; They climb into the houses, They enter through the windows like a thief.

esv.text: They leap upon the city, they run upon the walls, they climb up into the houses, they enter through the windows like a thief.

cnv.text: 他們衝入城鎮， 奔上城牆， 爬進房屋， 像盜賊一樣從窗戶爬進去。

ccb.text: 它们冲向城邑，蹿上城墙， 爬进房屋， 如盗贼般破窗而入。
